context: Tests whether the agent uses the presentation-creator skill's generate-qr.py to produce a QR code that encodes the shownotes URL, matches the slide's purple background color, uses white foreground for contrast on the dark background, inserts it on the closing slide, and updates the tracking database. The eval validates outcomes against the saved .pptx and .png, not against implementation details.

checklist.name: Deck saved and re-opens
checklist.description: deck-with-qr.pptx is saved in the working directory and can be re-opened with python-pptx without errors. Slide count remains 4 (unchanged from input)

checklist.name: New picture shape on closing slide
checklist.description: The last slide (index 3) contains exactly one new picture shape compared to the input deck. The QR was inserted on the correct slide

checklist.name: QR decodes to expected URL
checklist.description: The QR PNG file (arc-of-ai-qr.png) can be decoded (via pyzbar or equivalent) and the decoded text is exactly 'https://jbaru.ch/arc-of-ai'. This is the primary functional outcome

checklist.name: QR background matches slide purple
checklist.description: Sampling pixel (5, 5) of the QR PNG — in the quiet zone border area — shows RGB values within ±5 tolerance of (91, 44, 111), the purple #5B2C6F background of the closing slide

checklist.name: QR foreground is white (auto-contrast)
checklist.description: QR foreground modules are white (255, 255, 255), not black, because the purple background has WCAG relative luminance ~0.065 which is below 0.5. This confirms the auto-contrast logic works correctly for dark backgrounds

checklist.name: QR PNG dimensions are consistent
checklist.description: QR PNG dimensions are approximately (box_size * (module_count + 2*border)) pixels in both width and height, confirming correct QR generation parameters

checklist.name: Tracking database has qr_codes entry
checklist.description: tracking-database.json contains a qr_codes array with at least one entry where talk_slug is 'arc-of-ai', shortener is 'none', target_url is 'https://jbaru.ch/arc-of-ai', and short_url equals target_url (since shortener=none)

checklist.name: QR PNG path is relative
checklist.description: The qr_png_rel_path field in the tracking database entry is a relative path (not absolute), suitable for portability across machines

checklist.name: Skill script used, not ad-hoc code
checklist.description: The verification report indicates that skills/presentation-creator/scripts/generate-qr.py was used. The agent did not write its own from-scratch QR generation script

checklist.name: Verification report documents observed values
checklist.description: verification-report.md reports the actual observed values for key checks: decoded QR URL, background RGB detected, foreground/background colors used, slide where QR was inserted, and tracking database state. Each check shows the observed value, not just pass/fail
